# Affirmed Behaviors (curated)

Patterns the user explicitly approved — keep doing them. Ranked by recency × frequency.

## Top 10 most-affirmed

1. **test-feature-when-dependency-lands** (1x since 2026-06-21) — Run a feature the instant its blocking dependency lands — don't assume wired = works
2. **scope-convention-change-to-one-consumer** (1x since 2026-06-08) — Scoped an S3 path-convention change to the matcher, not the shared org_s3_key helper
3. **audit-file-character-before-applying-global-rule** (2x since 2026-05-29) — Audited destination file's character before moving code into it
4. **intelligent-disobedience-over-sycophancy** (2x since 2026-05-26) — Push back on a default assumption when evidence supports a smarter path
5. **wizard-questions-before-sub-agent-fanout** (1x since 2026-05-17) — Pause to wizard-ask 2-4 ambiguity questions before kicking off a coordinated sub-agent fan-out
6. **honor-agent-vs-user-category-boundary** (1x since 2026-05-16) — Separated agent-action timeline from user-response when designing an analytic table
7. **argued-case-instead-of-capitulating-on-pushback** (1x since 2026-05-15) — Argued the case for Option D with reasoning instead of folding to MV pushback
